objectives: Discover target domains and identify high-priority targets
Map the target domains and identify potential vulnerabilities
Create a comprehensive list of target domains and their corresponding vulnerabilities
tools: Domain name lookup tools (e.g. Whois, DNS query tools)
Web scraping tools (e.g. Beautiful Soup, Scrapy)
success_criteria: A comprehensive list of target domains and their corresponding vulnerabilities
A clear identification of high-priority targets based on the Immunefi Vulnerability Severity Classification System V2.3
A thorough understanding of the target domains and their respective vulnerabilities

objectives: Prioritize vulnerabilities based on potential impact and exploitability
tools: Vulnerability scanning tools (e.g. Metasploit, Burp Suite)
Risk assessment tools (e.g. Riskify, Common Crawl)
success_criteria: A list of potential vulnerability classes and their corresponding exploitability
A prioritized list of vulnerabilities based on potential impact and exploitability
A clear understanding of the vulnerabilities and their respective exploitability

objectives: Exploit vulnerabilities to demonstrate proof of concept
Test the effectiveness of the exploit on multiple targets
tools: Social engineering tools (e.g. Social Engineer Toolkit, phishing kits)
success_criteria: Proof of concept for all identified vulnerabilities
Demonstration of the exploit's effectiveness on multiple targets
A thorough understanding of the exploit's mechanics

objectives: Communicate with the Threshold Network team
Obtain feedback and validation from the Threshold Network team
tools: Collaboration tools (e.g. Google Drive, Microsoft Teams)
success_criteria: Communication with the Threshold Network team
Obtaining feedback and validation from the Threshold Network team

objectives: Create a comprehensive report of the findings
Prepare submissions for the Threshold Network team
tools: Document management tools (e.g. Google Docs, Microsoft Word)
success_criteria: A comprehensive report of the findings
Prepared submissions for the Threshold Network team
A thorough understanding of the findings and their respective vulnerabilities

priority_targets.description: Identify potential smart contract vulnerabilities and prioritize them based on potential impact and exploitability
Identify potential vulnerabilities that could result in loss of user funds and prioritize them accordingly
Identify potential vulnerabilities in the Bitcoin bridge security and prioritize them based on potential impact and exploitability

risk_considerations.description: Identify the risks associated with reconnaissance and take steps to mitigate them
risk_considerations.mitigation: Use secure communication channels and protect personal identifiable information

risk_considerations.description: Identify the risks associated with exploitability and take steps to mitigate them
risk_considerations.mitigation: Use secure exploit frameworks and protect sensitive information

risk_considerations.description: Identify the risks associated with communication and take steps to mitigate them
risk_considerations.mitigation: Use secure communication channels and protect sensitive information
